cpu.description: GCP n2d-standard-4 (4 vCPU, 16 GB). RAG stack already running from rag-deploy-blueprint step.

env: Linux host with Docker + Docker Compose plugin. RAG stack is already running: ingestor server at http://localhost:8082, rag-server at http://localhost:8081. NGC_API_KEY is set. cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/. The ingestor REST API accepts file uploads at POST /v1/ingest/files and exposes task status at GET /v1/ingest/tasks/{task_id}.

expects.query: Use the rag-ingest-documents skill to upload the file docs/accuracy-benchmarks.md into a new collection called test_collection via the ingestor API at http://localhost:8082. Confirm ingestion completed successfully. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-ingest-documents SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it called the ingestor upload endpoint with the specified file and collection name test_collection
The agent's trajectory shows it polled the task status endpoint to confirm ingestion completed
The agent's trajectory shows it reported the final ingestion status

expects.query: Add all the PDF files in the docs/ folder to my knowledge base and tell me if any failed.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-ingest-documents SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it verified ingestor server health before uploading
The agent's trajectory shows it submitted documents for ingestion via the ingestor API
The agent's trajectory shows it checked ingestion status for submitted tasks
The agent's trajectory shows it reported a summary including any failed documents
